# comfyui_inventory (Data Source)

Returns live ComfyUI runtime inventory values for built-in dynamic model categories such as checkpoints and LoRAs.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `kinds` (List of String) Optional subset of inventory kinds to query. When omitted, all generated built-in kinds are queried.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Identifier for this inventory query.
- `inventories` (Attributes List) Inventory values discovered from the live ComfyUI server, grouped by normalized kind. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--inventories))

<a id="nestedatt--inventories"></a>
### Nested Schema for `inventories`

Read-Only:

- `kind` (String) Normalized inventory kind such as checkpoints or loras.
- `value_count` (Number) Number of live values returned for this inventory kind.
- `values` (List of String) Sorted live values available for this inventory kind.
